data.descriptionShort: Get results in 10 minutes a day!
data.descriptionLong: Devin uses short bursts of high-intensity exercise to torch fat and calories, get lean and strong in just 10 minutes a day.

modules.equipment: Dumbbells*, Resistance Bands*, Yoga Mat*, Foam Roller*

modules.title: Is 600 Seconds Right For Me?
modules.content: If you think you don’t have time to workout, think again. In 600 Secs, your trainer Devin wastes no time, packing more intensity into 10 minutes than most people do in an hour at the gym. No matter your schedule or how demanding your life gets, you can fit a 10-minute workout (or more) into your day.

modules.title: What Are The Workouts Like?
modules.content: 600 Secs features a wide variety of targeted workouts for your abs, booty, legs, arms, core, plus strength, cardio, and recovery — that you can stack to reach any goal. It’ll go by quickly, but make no mistake — you will work hard. Devin uses high intensity intervals to make the most of your 10 minutes — he doesn’t let a single second go to waste.

modules.title: Tools + Equipment
modules.content: Light dumbbells or bands, although some workouts require only bodyweight. A mat is recommended.

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

modules.title: Brie B. Lost 7.2 lbs
modules.testimonial: 600 Secs is the perfect solution to my scattered schedule. My stomach is flat and toned now, and I see a six-pack, which I’ve never had before!
modules.disclaimer: Results vary depending on starting point and effort. Results achieved in 69 days by stacking multiple workouts.
